goal: Capacitor 8.3.1 scaffold on feat/capacitor-ios-wrap. Pre-iOS-project setup so 1.12 can run `npx cap add ios` against a clean, reproducible scaffold matching the cap-sandbox playbook.
done: package.json: added @capacitor/cli, @capacitor/core, @capacitor/ios all pinned at 8.3.1; new scripts stage:cap, sync:cap, open:ios. package-lock.json committed (96 packages, 0 vulnerabilities) for reproducible iOS builds — no Netlify side effect since deploy currently does not run npm install. capacitor.config.json at repo root: appId com.meowtarot.app, appName MeowTarot, webDir www. scripts/stage-cap-www.sh: rsync-based, idempotent (rm -rf www/ then rebuild), aborts on missing required source. Stages 10 root HTML surfaces (index/daily/question/question-draw/full/reading/profile/features/meanings/overall) + js/ css/ assets/ data/ share/ sharekit/ + the matching th/ HTML mirror only. SEO landers (cards/, tarot-card-meanings/, quiz/, today/, daily-card/ and their TH equivalents) excluded per founder. .gitignore delta: www/, .DS_Store recursively (ios/ intentionally NOT ignored — 1.12 commits it).
verified: npm install resolved 96 packages, 0 vulnerabilities. npx cap --version → 8.3.1. npm run stage:cap produced clean www/: 0 .DS_Store files, 0 *.md files, 10/10 root HTML files staged, 6/6 root dirs staged (js 118 files, css 6, assets 1, data 3, share 5, sharekit 5), 10/10 TH HTML mirrors staged, all 10 SEO-lander paths absent (5 root + 5 th/). node --test passes 64/64 (1 skipped). meow-v1 SVG audit: only one repo reference (tarot-card-meanings/index.html:183) which is excluded from www/; assets/meow-v1/ does not exist on disk; runtime path uses meow-v2 via cdn.meowtarot.com — no founder action needed.
notes: Hard constraints honored: NO `cap add ios`, NO `cap init`, NO `cap sync`, NO Simulator boot. Branch lives at feat/capacitor-ios-wrap, NOT merged to main — founder smoke-tests via `cd www && python3 -m http.server 8000` before greenlighting 1.12. Companion to commit 95cffa0 (asset-config capacitor:// guard) which already landed on main.

goal: Generate ios/ via Capacitor 8 SPM, sync www bundle, build for iPhone 17 Pro Simulator iOS 26.4, boot, and verify the MeowTarot homepage renders inside WKWebView. First Simulator build of the real product (not the sandbox).
done: Stage 2: `npx cap add ios` generated ios/ tree in ~40ms — SPM (Package.swift written), no Podfile, no top-level xcworkspace. CFBundleIdentifier wired to PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=com.meowtarot.app in pbxproj. `npm run sync:cap` (re-stage + cap sync) copied 10 HTML surfaces + js/css/assets/data/share/sharekit/ + trimmed th/ mirror into ios/App/App/public/ and re-wrote Package.swift for plugins. 19 files committed under ios/; Capacitor's nested .gitignore (App/App/public, App/build, DerivedData, xcuserdata, capacitor-cordova-ios-plugins) keeps regenerated and per-user files out of git. Stage 3: cold xcodebuild against destination platform=iOS Simulator,id=D9A9485F-C5E1-41AE-AC29-727B85E96FBE (iPhone 17 Pro 26.4) → BUILD SUCCEEDED, signed with 'Sign to Run Locally' (Simulator-only, no provisioning). simctl install + launch succeeded; PID 86489. Screenshot at /tmp/meowtarot-home.png shows full hero card 'Your card awaits today' with Draw CTA, EN/TH toggle, READINGS tile grid (Ask a Question, Celtic Cross, Card Library, My Journey), and bottom nav (Home/Today/Draw/Cards/Profile). No white-screen, no layout collapse. Log capture (/tmp/meowtarot-logs.txt, 8927 lines) shows zero 404 / ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND / failed-to-load, zero TypeError / ReferenceError / Uncaught, and only successful WebURLSchemeTaskProxy::startLoading → didComplete pairs (Capacitor scheme handler resolving bundle resources). simctl openurl probe to capacitor://localhost/daily.html was rejected by LSApplicationWorkspaceErrorDomain 115 — expected, since the scheme isn't registered as an external URL type in Info.plist; internal tile-tap nav is unaffected.
verified: BUILD SUCCEEDED on first try; com.meowtarot.app PID 86489 launched cleanly; homepage screenshot confirms hero + READINGS tile grid + bottom nav render correctly; log scan: 0 file-not-found / 0 JS exceptions / 0 scheme-handler errors. SPM-only confirmed (no Podfile, no top-level xcworkspace). Bundle ID com.meowtarot.app verified in pbxproj.
notes: VERDICT: ✅ HOMEPAGE RENDERS. Expected-breakage observations not surfaced in this static-load smoke test (no interaction was driven), but they remain queued for 1.13: (a) Supabase OAuth redirect to capacitor://localhost will be rejected by Google/Apple — unaddressed, awaiting auth-strategy PR; (b) outbound share URLs constructed from window.location.origin will encode capacitor://localhost — unaddressed, awaiting share-origin override PR; (c) asset-resolver.js HEAD requests against same-origin capacitor:// paths may behave oddly — file is off-limits, observe-only. The asset-config capacitor:// guard from Track 1.11 (commit 95cffa0) is now active; card art will use PROD_ASSET_REVISION instead of dev-${Date.now()}. Cold xcodebuild took ~120s as predicted by sandbox playbook. Stale `com.meowtarot.sandbox-default` scene state from the 1.10 sandbox remains in simulator data; harmless, prior-session leftover from PID 16971.

goal: Re-stage bottom-nav-reachable routes after founder Simulator smoke test surfaced that bottom-nav.js Today tab and Cards tab dead-link in the iOS bundle. Audit then expanded scope to all five 1.11-trimmed routes.
done: Audit: grepped staged www/ for /today/, /tarot-card-meanings/, /cards/, /quiz/, /daily-card/. After excluding canonical-URL builders, JSON-LD/hreflang metadata, and active-tab string-match, found real in-app nav references for ALL FIVE routes — bottom-nav Today→/today/ (line 55) and Cards→/tarot-card-meanings/ (line 51), homepage tile to /tarot-card-meanings/, meanings.html → suit pages → /cards/<slug>/, reading.html footer pills → /quiz/tarot-card-personality/ and /daily-card/, plus TH equivalents. Patch: extended scripts/stage-cap-www.sh with ROUTE_DIRS=(today daily-card quiz tarot-card-meanings cards), rsync from repo root and from th/. js/bottom-nav.js untouched (treated as off-limits for this session). Bundle size: www/ went from ~3 MB to 9.6 MB; ios/App/App/public/ now 10 MB. Re-sync + cold xcodebuild → BUILD SUCCEEDED, clean uninstall+install+launch as PID 99672, homepage screenshot identical to 1.12, log scan filtered to PID 99672 → 0 file-not-found / 0 JS exceptions / 22 successful scheme-handler startLoading→didComplete pairs. Static bundle audit: all 8 simple route index.htmls present (today/daily-card/quiz/tarot-card-meanings × en/th); all 5 suit .html files present (major/wands/cups/swords/pentacles); /cards/<slug>/ deep links present for 78 EN + 78 TH cards.
root_cause: 1.11 trim used 'SEO landers vs in-app surfaces' as the deciding axis but those directories are BOTH — they're SEO landers AND primary in-app navigation targets. Original 1.10 diagnosis asked which routes to ship without cross-referencing js/bottom-nav.js to see what the chrome links to. That's the blind spot.
fix: Add ROUTE_DIRS array to staging script; rsync both root and th/ variants. TH route-dir loop warns-but-continues on missing dirs (parity gap is data, not staging failure).
verified: npm run stage:cap clean. node --test 64/64 pass (1 skipped). 0 .DS_Store / 0 *.md in www/. ios/App/App/public/{today,daily-card,quiz/tarot-card-personality,tarot-card-meanings}/index.html — all present, both en + th. ios/App/App/public/cards/<slug>/index.html — 78 en + 78 th. ios/App/App/public/tarot-card-meanings/{major,wands,cups,swords,pentacles}.html — all present. Build succeeded; PID 99672 launched cleanly; homepage renders; logs clean.
notes: Founder still needs to manually tap each bottom-nav tab and confirm: Today loads, Cards loads, footer pills from a completed reading load /quiz/tarot-card-personality/ and /daily-card/. Note: meanings.html links to /tarot-card-meanings/major (no .html, no trailing slash). Capacitor's iOS WKWebView scheme handler may or may not resolve extensionless URLs to .html — if Today and Cards tabs work but the suit subpages 404, that's the next bug to diagnose (not this session). Top-left ◀ Cap Sandbox indicator persists in screenshots — cosmetic, app-switcher back-target from PID 16971; xcrun simctl erase booted would clear it but that nukes auth state too.

goal: Founder tapped Today after the bottom-nav fix landed and saw it render unstyled. Diagnose root cause and fix the EN bottom-nav-reachable routes so chrome + page styling render in the iOS bundle.
done: Diagnosis (read-only audit): grepped /
root_cause: SEO landers were authored to load minimal CSS (just styles.css) when the broader site uses 4 stylesheets. Works on Netlify because Google bots don't care about styling, and human visitors rarely land on these pages. Surfaced in iOS bundle because (a) bottom-nav routes Today and Cards tabs INTO these pages, and (b) Capacitor's strict scheme handler doesn't have Netlify's pretty-URL rewriting that was masking the relative-path issue.
fix: Add 3 missing <link rel="stylesheet"> + Google Fonts preconnect block to 9 EN files. Convert ../ relative paths to absolute / in the 3 nested-subdir files. js/bottom-nav.js untouched.
verified: node --test 64/64 (1 skipped). All 9 files now have 4 our-css refs (was 1). 0 remaining ../ asset paths in patched files. xcodebuild ✅ on first try; homepage and /today/ both render with full chrome; 0 WebKit didFails post-fix.
notes: OUT OF SCOPE — flagged for separate sessions per Option B in the session prompt: (1) 78 cards/<slug>/index.html files have the same missing-CSS bug (all 78 load only /css/styles.css + Google Fonts). Tapping a card from the Card Library will land on an unstyled card detail page. Scope: 78 EN + 78 TH = 156 files; needs founder green-light for batch rewrite. (2) 78 tarot-card-meanings/<slug>-tarot-meaning/index.html files (the wordy-slug card-meaning pages) have ZERO <link rel=stylesheet> at all — they're entirely unstyled. Larger problem class. (3) TH equivalents of all 9 patched files (th/today/, th/daily-card/, th/quiz/tarot-card-personality/, th/tarot-card-meanings/index + 5 suit files) have the same bug. /th/* content is off-limits per session rules — deferred. Same-day Netlify rendering quality is identical (verified by reading the unfixed source) so live site users see the same pages; this is not introducing user-facing regression on the web, only fixing iOS-bundle parity for the few routes the bottom-nav drives users into.

goal: Fix bottom-nav (Today/Cards) and homepage Card Library tile in iOS bundle. Founder smoke test surfaced that tapping these tabs renders unstyled homepage HTML. Empirical reproduction in #4 confirmed Capacitor 8 WKURLSchemeHandler does not auto-resolve trailing-slash directory URLs — falls back to root index.html at the wrong base URL, breaking relative paths.
done: Audit (1.12 follow-up #4) found 239 source files would need edits to convert /<dir>/ hrefs to /<dir>/index.html. Source-file rewrite at that scale unmaintainable. Instead: post-stage sed pass in scripts/stage-cap-www.sh that rewrites the bundled copy only — source files clean, Netlify behavior preserved. Four sed patterns: (A) HTML href="/<path>/" → /index.html — covers all card-detail breadcrumbs, footer pills, homepage Card Library tile, suit-page links; (B) JS template literal `${prefix}/<path>/` → /index.html — covers bottom-nav.js Today and Cards; (C) localize/localizeLink/localizeHref/location.replace string-arg trailing-slash → /index.html — covers card-page.js + components/navbar.js + pages/<slug>-card.js crumbMeanings/footerIndex/window.location.replace; (D) JS template literal `/cards/${slug}/` and TH mirror → /index.html — covers components/card-meaning-components.js suit-tile clicks. Deferred (TODO in script): canonical-card-routes.js:182 (output consumed by both nav AND SEO canonical builder, blanket rewrite would damage live SEO); meanings.js:117 basePath (rare unknown-slug fallback); pages/<slug>-card.js:96 hardcoded fallbacks (only hit when getCanonicalCardPath returns null).
root_cause: Capacitor 8 WKURLSchemeHandler (binary xcframework, no source available) doesn't append /index.html for directory URLs ending in /. Returns root index.html as SPA-fallback at the new URL, where the homepage's relative CSS paths (css/styles.css) resolve incorrectly to /<dir>/css/styles.css → 11 didFails per navigation. bottom-nav.js Today→/today/ and Cards→/tarot-card-meanings/ were built with the trailing-slash convention because Netlify pretty-URL rewriting masks the issue on the web.
fix: Post-stage sed pass converts all in-bundle same-origin trailing-slash hrefs to explicit /<dir>/index.html. Anchored patterns prevent false positives on https://… URLs (canonical, hreflang, JSON-LD @id, og:url, ${baseUrl} templates).
verified: Pre-rewrite empirical (#4): tapping /today/ from homepage → 11 didFails, homepage HTML rendered at /today/ with broken CSS. Post-rewrite: 0 trailing-slash same-origin hrefs in staged www/ across all 5 routes (today, daily-card, quiz/tarot-card-personality, tarot-card-meanings, cards/<slug>); SEO preservation evidence — canonical+hreflang+JSON-LD @id+${baseUrl} template literals all retain trailing slash. node --test 64/64 (1 skipped baseline). Clean rebuild + uninstall + install + launch as PID 51219: 0 WebKit didFails, homepage screenshot /tmp/meowtarot-home-postfix.png renders with full chrome (purple hero, READINGS tile grid, bottom nav). Installed-bundle proof: grep -E 'today/index|tarot-card-meanings/index' on .app/public/js/bottom-nav.js confirms both lines have /index.html; .app/public/index.html Card Library tile has /tarot-card-meanings/index.html.
notes: Founder must manually tap each bottom-nav tab + footer pill + homepage tile to confirm interaction-time behavior — I can't drive UI taps from CLI. Expected to work: Today, Cards, Card Library tile (homepage + desktop navbar), reading.html footer pills (Daily Card / Quiz), card-detail breadcrumbs (back to Card Index), card-detail footer pills (Today/Quiz/Card Index/Next Card). Expected MAYBE-still-broken (deferred): rare paths through getCanonicalCardPath fallbacks, search-result href in meanings.js for unknown slugs. Web/Netlify behavior unaffected — sed pass operates only on the staged www/ which is gitignored and rebuilt on each stage:cap. SEO canonicals on the live site keep trailing slash, as required by the search ecosystem.
